output.title: TikTok & Reel Hooks for Tenants Fighting to Get Their Security Deposit Back
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your deposit? These viral TikTok hooks and Reel scripts help tenants demand their money back in 60 seconds.
content_outline: Hook Psychology: Why Angry Tenants Stop Scrolling
Script Template 1: The 'Invoice Denied' Reverse POV
Script Template 2: '3 Things My Landlord Legally Can't Deduct'
Script Template 3: The Silent Walkthrough + Text Overlay
Caption & CTA Swipe File for Deposits-Back.com
key_points: POV: You left the apartment spotless and your landlord just ghosted your $2,000 security deposit.
My landlord tried to withhold $800 for 'normal wear and tear'—so I sent a demand letter in 60 seconds instead of hiring a lawyer.
If your landlord hasn't returned your deposit within 30 days, they may already owe you penalties under state law.
Stop letting landlords keep your money because you're 'too nice' to ask for it back.
For $19.99, Deposits-Back.com writes and sends your state-specific security deposit demand letter with no sign-up and no subscription.
output.cta: Don't let your landlord keep what's yours. Visit Deposits-Back.com now, answer a few quick questions, and get your professionally written demand letter sent in 60 seconds—for just $19.99. No sign-up. No subscription. Just your deposit back.
output.target_audience: Problem-aware US renters who have recently moved out and are experiencing landlords withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting from their security deposit.
